excerpt: # why did the word speak 10 words from a mountain to his 12? ![20260411_124337.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9f022469-e3cf-4679-a892-67e1420ab97d)
body:
# why did the word speak 10 words from a mountain to his 12?
![20260411_124337.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9f022469-e3cf-4679-a892-67e1420ab97d)


**Why did THE WORD speak 10 words from a mountain to his 12?**
If the **12** received the **10 words** they would be equipped to receive **THE WORD** who spoke them.
If the **12** grow in the **10 words** they received they grow in love (loving on) **THE WORD** they received/supposed-to-receive.
The **12** were given the **10 words** by **THE WORD** to form the "kingdom-of-heaven-on-earth-shape" with **THE WORD** as the king and the **12** as the priests to other nations.
The **12** were given the **10 words** to do them and show the doing of them to the nations, thus drawing the nations to **THE WORD** as king.
